  "findings": [
    "Breaker and conductor ampacity mismatch staged for installation",
    "Potential violation of termination temperature ratings under NEC 110.14(C)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Reject the staged mismatched overcurrent protective devices or conductors",
    "Re-evaluate conductor sizing based on terminal temperature limits (60C/75C) and overcurrent device ratings per NEC 240",
    "Procure correctly matched breakers and conductors before installation begins"
  ],
  "rationale": "The staged materials exhibit a mismatch between the overcurrent protective device rating and the conductor ampacity. Under NEC 240 and 110.14(C), conductors must be protected in accordance with their ampacity, factoring in the temperature ratings of the terminations. Installing these mismatched components would create a severe fire and safety hazard, failing to comply with code requirements.",

    "NEC 240",
    "NEC 110.14(C)"
  ]
}
